---
title: "git_trainer.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/git_trainer.ts"
loc: 33
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.58
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 5.83
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [setFileGravity](file://./gravity_db.ts)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `seedGitGravity`
- `seedGitGravity`
- `root`
- `execa`
- `lines`
- `frequencies`
- `trimmed`
- `absolutePath`
- `seededCount`
- `isMain`
